etymology.description: phonetic 𦝠 (luó) + semantic 貝(貝) (bèi, "cowry; money") -> to gain (as in winning) wealth or advantage
etymology.interpretation: The character 贏 (yíng, "to win") combines the phonetic element 𦝠 (luó) with the semantic 貝(貝) (bèi, "cowry; money"), reflecting the concept of acquiring wealth or advantage through victory.
etymology.simplification: 赢 is the simplified form of 贏 and involves the simplification of 貝 to 贝(贝) (bèi, "cowry") and removing 𦝠 (luó).

examples.chinese: 他赢得了比赛(他贏得了比賽)。
我们必须努力才能赢(我們必須努力才能贏)。
examples.english: We must work hard to win.

examples.chinese: 她赢了一大笔奖金(她贏了一大筆獎金)。
examples.pinyin: Tā yíngle yī dà bǐ jiǎngjīn.
